name: Endpoint Protect Multiple Failed Login Attempts
description: Detects a user failing to log in after multiple attempts, potentially indicating brute-force attacks, password spraying, or other credential access attempts on an endpoint.

prompts.prompt: Multiple failed login attempts detected on an endpoint, possibly indicating a brute-force or password spraying attack. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **User** {user}, **Source User** {source_user}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Failure Reason** {failure_reason}. Investigate this activity for unauthorized credential access attempts.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that is failing to authenticate.

parameters.name: source_user
parameters.description: The user account from which the authentication attempt originates.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for the authentication failure.

parameters.name: failure_reason
parameters.description: The reason for the failed login.
